CustomField.description: Raw caller-supplied idempotency key, retained on pre-arrival (Unrouted) captures so redeliverCapturedSignal can rewrite Signal_Key__c from the correlation-scoped capture hash to the instance-scoped routed hash once a matching instance becomes active. This closes the at-most-once gap across the pre-arrival-to-active boundary. Not unique (the dedup constraint lives on Signal_Key__c).
CustomField.label: Idempotency Key
